improvement_rule: Build cleaner, more accessible, more responsive UI than a basic Streamlit implementation. Preserve all BRD workflows and content hierarchy while upgrading visual quality to polished client-demo standard.

magic_selection.rationale: No reference URL provided. Building from BRD text requirements and figure descriptions.

motion_rationale: Healthcare portal — enterprise dashboard mode. Subtle hover feedback, toast enter/exit, skeleton loading, collapsible nav only. No decorative motion.
layout_rationale: 7-page portal with sidebar nav. Dashboard and consultations use task_first_wide to avoid operational content trapped in narrow centered containers.
accessibility_commitment: All inputs labeled, focus states visible, color contrast WCAG AA minimum, keyboard nav supported.

tool_selection.source_material_reason: BRD DOCX with text requirements and figure references — no screenshots or Figma provided
tool_selection.layout_profile_reason: Healthcare domain + patient portal = portal_dashboard profile for data screens, auth_split_screen for login
tool_selection.magic_project_type_reason: Full application (website type in Magic terms)
tool_selection.ui_ux_pro_max_mode_reason: Healthcare domain requires enterprise density, calm compact, trustworthy palette
tool_selection.motion_intensity_reason: Healthcare + portal = subtle. No expressive motion on data tables.
tool_selection.qa_gate_reason: Playwright E2E covering all 10 BRD test cases + design quality score required
